docket_entries.description: CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 76892179) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WINTERS, RICHARD INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED
